header.title: Kisan Alert
landing.hero.title: Smart Farming, Powered by Data
landing.hero.subtitle: Real-time soil moisture tracking, satellite imagery analysis, and AI-driven crop recommendations — built for Indian farmers.
landing.features.title: Everything You Need to Grow Smarter
landing.features.subtitle: From satellite analytics to voice-enabled field alerts — a complete toolkit for modern agriculture.
landing.features.coordinateInputDesc: Enter your farm location via GPS coordinates or address search for hyper-local insights.
landing.features.metricComputationDesc: Auto-compute NDVI, NDWI, soil moisture, and vegetation indices from satellite data.
landing.features.interactiveVisualsDesc: Time-series charts, land cover maps, and side-by-side satellite comparisons.
landing.features.exportEasilyDesc: Download CSV reports and AI-generated advisory summaries for offline use.
landing.whyUs.title: Built for the Indian Agricultural Landscape
landing.whyUs.subtitle: Designed with local soil types, regional languages, and monsoon-aware scheduling in mind.
landing.whyUs.point1: Multi-language support for 13+ regional Indian languages
landing.whyUs.point3: Satellite-driven NDVI and land cover analysis
